name: remote-browser
description: Moveable, resizable, fullscreen-toggleable iframe view onto the desktop-browser MCP's KasmVNC surface. Lets the user occasionally see + take over (logins, captchas) while the model drives Chromium via CDP. Adds a primary-row header icon, the BrowserWindow modal, and the Alt+B hotkey that opens it. Reaches the Chromium surface via the bridge's reverse proxy at /proxy/browser/ (KasmVNC running on 127.0.0.1:3001). Disabling this module hides the icon, unbinds the hotkey, and unmounts the modal.
